summary: Added a 'Git Worktrees' section to PLAYBOOK.md documenting the worktree layout (.team/worktrees/<slug> with branch feature/<slug>), lifecycle (created on agt run, preserved on failure, removed on success), and manual inspection/cleanup commands (git worktree list, git -C ... status, git worktree remove --force, git branch -D, git worktree prune). No code changes were needed; all 558 existing tests continue to pass.
